key_phrases: Our borrowings increased to Rs 30 billion at the end of the quarter. A large part of this incremental borrowing is temporary in nature, which has already been repaid as we speak.
we want to run the business at a healthy operating margin between 45% and 50%
we have performed exceptionally well on this front, and we have had pretty much zero to no business loss at all
our annualized average return on equity stood at 45.5%
we achieved our lifetime best quarterly profit of over Rs 2.1 billion
